lucis.lux.hff.data
 

  • Uses of FirearmStats.Builder in lucis.lux.hff.data

    Methods in lucis.lux.hff.data that return FirearmStats.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static FirearmStats.Builder
    FirearmStats.builder()
    Creates a new FirearmStats.Builder instance for constructing a FirearmStats object.
    FirearmStats.Builder
    FirearmStats.Builder.calibre(String calibre)
    Sets the calibre of the ammunition used by the firearm.
    FirearmStats.Builder
    FirearmStats.Builder.disabled(boolean disabled)
    Sets whether the HFF mechanics are disabled.
    FirearmStats.Builder
    FirearmStats.Builder.firearmClass(FirearmClass firearmClass)
    Sets the historical and mechanical classification of the firearm.
    FirearmStats.Builder
    FirearmStats.Builder.firearmType(FirearmType firearmType)
    Sets the functional type of the firearm.
    FirearmStats.Builder
    FirearmStats.Builder.fireMode(FireMode fireMode)
    Sets the firing mode of the firearm.
    FirearmStats.Builder
    FirearmStats.Builder.horizontalRecoil(float horizontalRecoil)
    Sets the horizontal recoil strength.
    FirearmStats.Builder
    FirearmStats.Builder.jamChance(float jamChance)
    Sets the chance of the firearm jamming.
    FirearmStats.Builder
    FirearmStats.Builder.misfireChance(float misfireChance)
    Sets the chance of the firearm misfiring.
    FirearmStats.Builder
    FirearmStats.Builder.movementPenalty(float movementPenalty)
    Sets the penalty to accuracy when moving.
    FirearmStats.Builder
    FirearmStats.Builder.projectileAmount(int projectileAmount)
    Sets the number of projectiles fired per shot.
    FirearmStats.Builder
    FirearmStats.Builder.projectileCapacity(int projectileCapacity)
    Sets the maximum number of projectiles the firearm can hold.
    FirearmStats.Builder
    FirearmStats.Builder.projectileVelocity(float projectileVelocity)
    Sets the velocity of the projectile when fired.
    FirearmStats.Builder
    FirearmStats.Builder.reloadTime(float reloadTime)
    Sets the time in seconds required to reload the firearm.
    FirearmStats.Builder
    FirearmStats.Builder.rpm(float rpm)
    Sets the rounds per minute (rate of fire).
    FirearmStats.Builder
    FirearmStats.Builder.spreadBase(float spreadBase)
    Sets the base spread of projectiles (in degrees).
    FirearmStats.Builder
    FirearmStats.toBuilder()
    Creates a new FirearmStats.Builder instance initialized with the values of this FirearmStats object.
    FirearmStats.Builder
    FirearmStats.Builder.verticalRecoil(float verticalRecoil)
    Sets the vertical recoil strength.
